dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8065 IH: Restoring Executive Branch Authorities to Oversee Offices of the United States Attorneys Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Schmidt introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend title 28, United States Code, to restore authority to the executive branch to oversee operations of the Offices of the United States Attorneys, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Restoring Executive Branch Authorities to Oversee Offices of the United States Attorneys Act of 2026.

section.header: Restoring constitutional limitations on the United States courts
section.text: Section 546 of title 28, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (c)(2), by inserting after after appointment the following: of that person; and
